description: Turkish startup providing digital pharmacy management and e-prescription platform. Connects pharmacies with patients and healthcare providers across Turkey.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to pharmacies; marketplace for patients
key_investors: Turkish VCs, Earlybird Digital East Fund
competitive_advantage: Early mover in Turkish e-prescription, growing pharmacy network

varden_fit.rationale: Pharmacy infrastructure in Turkey - potential integration point if expanding to Turkey
